description_long: This is a single low-top sneaker with a predominantly white exterior, showing visible signs of wear and dirt, especially around the sole and heel. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with white laces, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The upper material appears to be a combination of leather or synthetic leather, with a textile lining visible at the heel. The outsole is flat and made of rubber, with some discoloration and scuff marks indicating frequent use. The heel area is particularly worn, with some fraying and discoloration. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior surfaces.
description: A worn, white low-top sneaker with standard laces and visible dirt and scuff marks, especially on the sole and heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, worn heel, and slightly creased upper.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lacing, toe box, and some dirt on the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shoe's profile, laces, and more scuffing on the heel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heavily worn heel and inner lining.
